results.title: Anatomy of a Wine Barrel — World Cooperage
results.judge_reason: Describes barrel bilge/circumference tightening but covers only the source-domain anatomy without the taper+hoop compression mechanism that is core to the candidate.

results.title: Step-by-step Barrel Coopering — Lodi Winegrape
results.judge_reason: Directly describes tapered staves with bevel and iron-hoop compression — the exact source-domain mechanism the candidate is built upon.

results.title: What's a Cooper — ScienceInsights
results.judge_reason: Captures the no-nails-no-glue cohesion property and cooper hoop fastening which is a defining source-domain feature.

results.title: Trainable Dynamic Mask Sparse Attention (2025/8)
matched_keywords: hoop scalar (via learnable per-head time-scale parameter)
radial compression mask (partial via trainable mask)
results.judge_reason: Trainable per-head mask with a learnable scalar modulating selection strength resembles the candidate's hoop-scalar mask idea, though without a taper-shaped envelope or radial cohesion concept.

results.title: Revisiting Shape Convention of Transformer LMs (2026/2)
results.judge_reason: Analyzes the shape of attention distributions but does not propose a tapered envelope mask with a learnable hoop scalar.

results.title: ALiBi: Attention with Linear Biases
matched_keywords: tapered attention envelope (linear bias monotone shape)
results.judge_reason: ALiBi introduces a per-head learnable/fixed scalar that shapes attention by distance — closest LLM prior art for a single-scalar attention envelope, but it is monotone (not center-wider taper).

results.title: Attention as Binding: VSA Perspective (2025/12)
matched_keywords: no-explicit-edge cohesion (partial via binding instead of pairwise weights)
results.judge_reason: VSA-binding reframing was explicitly cited in the candidate as related but not implementing the taper-shaped envelope, so it is acknowledged prior art only.

results.title: Multi-Token Attention (2025/4)
results.judge_reason: Multi-token attention spans are distinct from the taper-shaped single-position envelope; candidate explicitly distinguishes itself from this work.
